Stage 01: HTML Parser

January 2025 — Rust

Introduction

This stage builds a tolerant HTML5 parser that can handle both well-formed documents and the kind of broken markup found on real websites.

Not a validator — a parser. We accept what browsers accept.

Key Features

  • Full HTML5 tokenization (35+ states)
  • Tolerant tree construction with error recovery
  • Semantic node classification for agents
  • Accessibility tree extraction
  • Zero dependencies — pure Rust std

Usage

cargo run -- parse index.html
cargo run -- accessibility index.html
echo '<h1>Hello</h1>' | cargo run -- parse

Related stages

  • Stage 02: DOM Tree
  • Stage 03: Network
